\tzpentry{ID3346}{Photon Neural Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3346 introduces Photon Neural Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_{ \text{photon-neural}} = \hbar g \sum_{i,j} \left( a_i^ \dagger \sigma_j^- e^{i \mathbf{k} \cdot ( \mathbf{r}_i - \mathbf{r}_j)} + \text{h.c.} \right) \end{equation}
